issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: Add orders table to production without downtime
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs pscale branch create, applies DDL on the branch, then pscale deploy-request create/diff/deploy for non-blocking rollout; baseline applies ALTER/CREATE directly on main with manual backups and no deploy-request workflow.

scenarios.name: Prisma + PlanetScale on Vercel Edge
scenarios.rationale: Treatment sets relationMode = "prisma" in the datasource, uses @planetscale/database for edge queries, and declares @@index for filtered columns; baseline uses default Prisma MySQL FK constraints that PlanetScale rejects.
